nodes.name: Generate Drafts (manual)
nodes.notes: Run manually while testing. To automate later, add a Schedule Trigger (e.g. daily 09:00) wired into 'Read Content Calendar'. NEVER auto-publish.

nodes.name: Read Content Calendar
nodes.notes: Reads every row. Select your Google Sheets credential on import. Sheet columns: date, platform, topic, service, target_audience, hook, caption, hashtags, asset_link, status, approval, publish_time, notes, row_number.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: 'claude-opus-4-8',
  max_tokens: 2000,
  system: 'أنت كاتب محتوى تسويقي محترف لشركة كيان ميديا (إنتاج فيديو/تصوير سينمائي في السعودية). اكتب بالعربية الفصحى السهلة بنبرة راقية وواثقة وبشرية تمامًا — لا تبدو وكأنها مولّدة آليًا، تجنّب الكليشيهات والإيموجي المفرط والعبارات المبالغ فيها. التزم بهوية علامة كيان: فاخرة، احترافية، موجزة. أعِد فقط كائن JSON صالح بهذا الشكل بدون أي نص إضافي: {"hook":"...","caption":"...","hashtags":"#..","cta":"..."} حيث caption مخصّص للمنصة المطلوبة وبطولها المناسب.',
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'المنصة: ' + ($json.platform||'') + '
الموضوع: ' + ($json.topic||'') + '
الخدمة: ' + ($json.service||'') + '
الجمهور المستهدف: ' + ($json.target_audience||'') + '
زاوية الجذب المقترحة: ' + ($json.hook||'') + '
ملاحظات: ' + ($json.notes||'') + '

اكتب نسخة منشور مخصّصة لهذه المنصة فقط، ثم أعد JSON فقط.' }]
}) }}

nodes.name: Claude Draft
nodes.notes: Anthropic Messages API. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in n8n env (server-side). Model claude-opus-4-8. Do NOT add temperature/top_p (removed on this model — would 400).

nodes.name: Write Draft → Ready for Review
nodes.notes: Writes the AI draft back and sets status = 'Ready for Review'. It does NOT touch the 'approval' column — a human sets that to 'Approved' before anything can publish.

nodes.name: Notify Owner (placeholder)
nodes.notes: Replace with your owner-notification channel (Gmail / Slack / WhatsApp template / Kian portal). Message: 'New social drafts are Ready for Review in the content calendar.' Do not include secrets.

nodes.name: Publish Scheduler (DISABLED)
nodes.notes: DISABLED on purpose. Enable ONLY after each platform's publishing API + permissions are reviewed and approved. The approval gate below still blocks anything not explicitly 'Approved'.

nodes.name: Approval Gate
nodes.notes: HARD GATE: only rows with approval='Approved', not already published, and a non-empty asset_link pass. Missing asset → never posts. FALSE branch is a no-op.

nodes.name: Publish LinkedIn (DISABLED)
nodes.notes: Placeholder. Wire to LinkedIn API only after app review + permissions. Use asset_link as the media.

nodes.name: Publish Instagram (DISABLED)
nodes.notes: Placeholder. Instagram Graph API (Business account) only after review.

nodes.name: Publish TikTok (DISABLED)
nodes.notes: Placeholder. TikTok Content Posting API only after approval.

nodes.name: Publish YouTube (DISABLED)
nodes.notes: Placeholder. YouTube Data API (Shorts) only after approval.

nodes.name: Mark Published
nodes.notes: DISABLED until real publishing is enabled — otherwise rows would be marked Published without actually posting.
